zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-1 Dimensional Standards - Rural and Residential Districts
zones.notes: Density not specified (-). Lot 435,600 sf (10 ac). Lot Coverage note [7]: max does not apply to greenhouse structures. Front-loaded garage setback 40 ft per note [2].

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-1 Dimensional Standards - Rural and Residential Districts
zones.notes: Density not specified (-). Front-loaded garage setback 40 ft per note [2].

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-1 Dimensional Standards - Rural and Residential Districts
zones.notes: Density and lot coverage not specified (-). Front-loaded garage setback 25 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-1 Dimensional Standards - Rural and Residential Districts
zones.notes: Density and lot coverage not specified (-). Front-loaded garage setback 20 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-1 Dimensional Standards - Rural and Residential Districts
zones.notes: Density and lot coverage not specified (-). Side setback '0 with 10 aggregate' (recorded 0). Front-loaded garage setback 20 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-1 Dimensional Standards - Rural and Residential Districts
zones.notes: Density and lot coverage not specified (-). Side setback note [6]: may be reduced to zero with zero aggregate for single-family attached. Front-loaded garage setback 20 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-1 Dimensional Standards - Rural and Residential Districts
zones.notes: Density and lot coverage not specified (-). Side setback '0 with 5 aggregate', note [6]. Front-loaded garage setback 20 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-1 Dimensional Standards - Rural and Residential Districts
zones.notes: Density 15.0 du/gross acre. Lot size/width/coverage not specified (-). Side setback '0 with 10 aggregate', note [6]. Front-loaded garage setback 20 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-1 Dimensional Standards - Rural and Residential Districts
zones.notes: Density 'No max; 15.1 min' (no maximum; 15.1 du/gross acre minimum). Lot size/width/coverage not specified (-). Front-loaded garage setback 20 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-1 Dimensional Standards - Rural and Residential Districts
zones.notes: Density 8.0 du/gross acre. Lot size two values: 4,500 sf (MH) / 1,500 sf (RV); 4,500 used as minimum.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-2 Dimensional Standards - Mixed-Use Districts
zones.notes: Residential density max 10.0 du/gross acre. Lot size and all setbacks not specified (-) in table.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-2 Dimensional Standards - Mixed-Use Districts
zones.notes: Residential density max 15.0 du/gross acre. Lot size = min district size 5.0 ac (217,800 sf), not per-lot. Front/streetside is a MAXIMUM of 20 ft (build-to). Side/rear not specified (-).

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-2 Dimensional Standards - Mixed-Use Districts
zones.notes: Residential density 'No max; >15.0 min'. Lot size = min district size 15.0 ac (653,400 sf). Front/streetside MAXIMUM 20 ft. Height 'Minimum 40; No maximum' - no max established (TBD). Side/rear not specified (-).

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-2 Dimensional Standards - Mixed-Use Districts
zones.notes: Residential density not specified (-). Lot size '15 ac unless converted from GC' (653,400 sf). Front 40 ft adjacent arterial, else 20 (20 used). Side 75 ft adjacent residential, 0 adjacent rail, else 20 (20 used). Rear same (20). Height 55 ft at setback, +1 ft per 3 ft added setback up to 120 ft max (120 = ceiling).

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-2 Dimensional Standards - Mixed-Use Districts
zones.notes: Residential density 'No maximum'. Lot size not specified (-). Front/streetside setback 'Refer to Section 5.13.4.H'. Side/rear not specified (-). Max height 60 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-2 Dimensional Standards - Mixed-Use Districts
zones.notes: Residential density max 15.0 du/gross acre. Lot size not specified (-). Front/streetside 'Refer to Section 5.13.4.H'. Side not specified (-). Rear 5 ft. Max height 40 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-3 Dimensional Standards - Nonresidential and Other Districts
zones.notes: District size minimum not specified (-). Front/streetside 10, side 10. Rear 20 ft adjacent residential (20 used). Max height 90 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-3 Dimensional Standards - Nonresidential and Other Districts
zones.notes: District size minimum not specified (-). Front/streetside 15. Side/rear 30 ft adjacent residential (30 used). Max height 30 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-3 Dimensional Standards - Nonresidential and Other Districts
zones.notes: District size minimum not specified (-). Front/streetside 20. Side/rear 50 ft adjacent residential (50 used). Max height 50 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-3 Dimensional Standards - Nonresidential and Other Districts
zones.notes: District size minimum 15 ac (653,400 sf). Front/streetside 30. Side/rear 80 ft adjacent residential (80 used). Max height 90 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-3 Dimensional Standards - Nonresidential and Other Districts
zones.notes: District size minimum 5 ac (217,800 sf). Front/streetside 25 ft (setback from peripheral property line). Side/rear values ambiguous due to PDF column wrapping (75 ft adjacent residential per text) - set TBD pending verification. Max height 50 ft.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-3 Dimensional Standards - Nonresidential and Other Districts
zones.notes: District size 15 ac (653,400 sf). Front 50 ft adjacent residential / 40 arterial / 20 else (20 used). Side 75 ft adjacent residential / 0 rail / 20 else (20 used). Rear same (20). Height 55 ft at setback, +1 ft per 3 ft added setback up to 120 ft max.

zones.source_citation: Table 4.1-3 Dimensional Standards - Nonresidential and Other Districts
zones.notes: District size 15 ac (653,400 sf). Front 50 ft arterial / 20 else (20 used). Side 200 ft adjacent residential / 0 rail / 20 else (20 used). Rear same (20). Height 65 ft at setback, +1 ft per 3 ft added setback up to 120 ft max.
